summary: Added the local-only V1 runtime persistence API route and wired external_model_call approval retry/resume recording. Local runtime results, run traces, tool calls, audit events, human checkpoints, and retry authorization are now persisted through local routes without enabling Supabase or external provider dispatch.
contractsChanged: Local agent run resume retry_after_external_model_approval trace step
risks: This is local-only runtime persistence; Supabase V1 runtime persistence remains unavailable by design.
Approval retry records authorization and run trace state only. It does not dispatch a real external provider from the local resume route.
Production SaaS, real provider transports, and exact provider pricing adapters remain out of scope.
needs: Docs owner can update the Runtime / AgentOps acceptance matrix row to completed for local/private-pilot route and retry wiring, with remaining caveats limited to Supabase, real providers, exact pricing, and production.
